description: Behavioral scenarios for the conversational Agentic RAG control flow.

scenarios.description: A direct follow-up should reuse papers that already cover step-level failure localization.

turns.question: 多 Agent 系统执行失败后，如何定位负责的 Agent 和最早出错步骤？
它能定位到具体步骤吗？

scenarios.description: A follow-up asking for a new application domain should retain useful method evidence and retrieve the missing evaluation evidence.

turns.question: 多 Agent 系统执行失败后，如何定位负责的 Agent 和最早出错步骤？
这种方法在代码 Agent 中有实验结果吗？

scenarios.description: A new retrieval topic must not seed the search with previous failure-localization evidence.

turns.question: 多 Agent 系统执行失败后，如何定位负责的 Agent 和最早出错步骤？
